name: Shunfa Hengye Corporation
summary: Shunfa Hengye Corporation operates as a real estate development company in China. It engages in the investment, development, operation, and management of residential, office, and hotel properties. The company is also involved in the architectural decoration and material sales activities. In addition, it provides property services, such as consulting, real estate agency, and greening project services. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Wanxiang Real Estate Development Co., Ltd. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Xiaoshan, China.
